caption: The video features a man dressed in a gray suit and tie, seated in front of a backdrop that prominently displays the hashtag "#BigDataSV 2015." He appears to be speaking at a professional event or conference related to big data. The man is wearing a headset microphone, indicating he is addressing an audience. In the first frame, he looks directly at the camera with a serious expression, suggesting he is engaged in delivering important information. In the second frame, he gestures with his hands, emphasizing a point as he continues to speak. A laptop is visible on the table in front of him, likely used for presenting data or slides relevant to his talk. The setting suggests a formal and informative atmosphere, typical of industry conferences or seminars.
